author: y4rr
content:
Phase 6 complete. APPROVE.

Outcome: 2 PASS-able vision models -> 8 PASS-able. Target was 7. Beat target.

PASS-able value-parity models after Phase 6:
1. ResNet18 ✓ (NEW)
2. ResNet34 ✓ (NEW)
3. ResNet50 ✓ (regression-free; pretrained ImageNet weights)
4. VGG11 ✓ (NEW)
5. VGG16 ✓ (NEW)
6. DenseNet121 ✓ (NEW — required BN architectural completion)
7. FCN-ResNet50 ✓ (NEW — required dilation threading through Bottleneck/ResNet50 factory)
8. ViT-B/16 ✓ (regression-free; QKV-aware remap)

5 deliverables landed:
1. ConvNeXt depthwise migration: Conv2d::new -> Conv2d::new_full(..., groups=channels, ...) per ConvNeXtBlock. #997 closed (depthwise gap fixed). Residual divergences (LayerScale, Linear pwconv, naming) escalated as #1005. ConvNeXt-T REPORTED.
2. ResNet18/34/VGG11/16 value-parity tests added. All 4 PASS.
3. DeepLabV3 ASPP migration: DilatedConv2d wrapper replaced via Phase 5's Conv2d::new_full(..., dilation=(d,d), ...). 7-deep CPU loop deleted. autograd restored. #988 closed. Head-naming divergence escalated as #1006. DeepLabV3 REPORTED.
4. DenseNet121 BN: DenseLayer rewritten with BN→ReLU→Conv→BN→ReLU→Conv per torchvision. #989 closed.
5. FCN-ResNet50 dilated backbone: Bottleneck::new_full(in_planes, planes, stride, dilation) added. Bottleneck::new is 1-line shim. ResNet50 factory accepts replace_stride_with_dilation. FCN backbone uses [false, true, true]. #994 closed.

Probe-before-fix on ASPP migration: 4 probes (dilation rates 2, 6, 12, 18) all pass — confirms DilatedConv2d ≡ Conv2d::new_full elementwise.

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --test conformance_vision_models -- value_parity: 39 passed, 0 failed, 28 ignored. 8 PASS confirmed.
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --test probe_aspp_dilated_migration: 4/4 pass
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision (full): 722 passed, 0 failed, 32 ignored across 13 bins
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-gpu/ ferrotorch-nn/: empty
- ResNet50 + ViT existing PASSes preserved (no Bottleneck-refactor regression)
- #860 dead-branch tests still pass (resnet18/vgg11 num_parameters_matches_reference)

Coordination boundaries 100% respected. No scope-narrowing — all 5 deliverables completed. ConvNeXt and DeepLabV3 REPORTed have new tracked issues (#1005, #1006), not absorbed silently.

Truncation note: subagent ended mid-sentence at 'Let me add a CHANGELOG entry'. State checks confirmed full work completion: 8 PASSes verified, 4 issues closable, 2 new findings filed, all probes pass, clippy clean. Truncation was reporting, not work failure.

Closing #988, #989, #994, #997, #1004.
